list.title: Available elections
list.subtitle: Browse elections you're eligible for and cast your vote when the election is open.

messages.notOpen: This election is not open yet.
messages.alreadyVoted: You already voted in this election.
messages.startBeforeConfiguredStartTime: This election cannot be started before its configured start time.
messages.vaultMissing: No local encrypted key vault was found for this election. Paste the backup JSON to continue.
messages.keyMismatch: The selected encrypted backup does not match this election's public encryption key.
messages.backupInvalid: Election key backup JSON is invalid.
messages.actionFailed: Unable to complete the election lifecycle action.

dialog.title: Publish election decryption key
dialog.subtitle: Unlock the encrypted private key locally, then publish it on-chain so everyone can decrypt ballots after voting ends.
dialog.backupPlaceholder: Paste the downloaded election-key JSON only if this browser does not already have the vault.

create.title: Create election
create.subtitle: A fresh election encryption keypair is generated in your browser. Only the public key is sent to the backend.
create.success: Election "{{title}}" created. Encrypted key backup downloaded. Public key fingerprint: {{fingerprint}}.

placeholders.title: Municipal Election 2026
placeholders.description: Describe the purpose and scope of this election.
placeholders.vaultPassword: Use a long unique password for this election key backup

errors.passwordMismatch: Vault password confirmation does not match.
errors.endAfterStart: End time must be after start time.

detailsPage.descriptionFallback: No description was provided for this election.

errors.missingUuid: Election UUID is missing from the URL.

candidates.title: Candidates
candidates.subtitleAdmin: Assign citizens to this election by CIN. The public interface will only show their name, party, and status.
candidates.subtitleCitizen: Only ACTIVE candidates are shown to citizens.
candidates.locked: Candidate management is locked once the election leaves REGISTRATION.
candidates.empty: No candidates have been assigned to this election yet.

errors.loadFailed: Unable to load candidates and supporting data.
errors.submitFailed: Unable to add candidate to this election.

vote.title: Your participation
vote.subtitle: Register your private voting identity during registration, then unlock it to cast your encrypted ballot during voting.

placeholders.passwordCreate: Create a password for your local voter identity

vote.vaultHintPresent: This browser already stores your encrypted voter identity vault. Use the same password you used when you first registered.
vote.vaultHintMissing: No local voter identity vault was found. Registering now will create one in this browser and reuse it for voting.
vote.alreadyCast: Your ballot has already been submitted for this election.
vote.registrationRequiredNote: You cannot vote yet because your identity commitment was not registered on-chain during the registration phase.
vote.registeredReady: Your private voting identity is already registered for this election.
vote.tallyClosed: Voting is closed. This election is currently in tally.

messages.registeredWithVault: Local voter identity created and registered for {{title}}.

errors.registrationLoadFailed: Unable to load your registration status for this election.
errors.passwordConfirmRequired: Confirm your identity password to create a local voter vault.
errors.passwordMismatch: Identity password confirmation does not match.
errors.registrationSubmitFailed: Unable to register your voting identity for this election.
errors.registrationRequired: Complete voter registration before casting a vote.
errors.alreadyCast: You have already submitted a ballot for this election.
errors.candidateRequired: Select a candidate before submitting your ballot.
errors.publicKeyMissing: Election encryption public key is missing.
errors.identityMismatch: The unlocked local voter identity does not match the identity registered for this election.
errors.castFailed: Unable to cast your vote for this election.

subtitle.admin: TALLY elections appear here. Unlock the election vault locally to publish any encrypted results that are still pending.
subtitle.citizen: Final election results appear here once the tally has been published.

states.empty: No elections are in the tally stage yet.
states.noBallots: No ballots were cast in this election.

pending.title: Results not published yet
pending.baseCopy: Ballots remain encrypted until the tally is completed.
pending.adminCopy: Publish the results from this browser by unlocking the election vault locally.
pending.citizenCopy: Check back once an administrator finalizes the tally.

fields.backupPlaceholder: Paste the saved election key backup if this browser does not already have it.

errors.loadElectionResults: Unable to load results for this election.
errors.loadPage: Unable to load election results right now.
errors.passwordRequired: Election vault password is required to publish results.
errors.passwordTooShort: Vault password must be at least {{min}} characters.
errors.encryptionPublicKeyMissing: Election encryption public key is missing.
errors.vaultMissing: Election key vault not found on this browser. Paste the backup JSON created during election setup.
errors.backupWrongElection: The provided key backup does not belong to this election.
errors.backupKeyMismatch: Election key backup does not match the configured encryption public key.
errors.publishFailed: Unable to publish results for this election.
errors.resultsUnavailable: Results are not available for this election.
errors.ballotInvalidJson: A decrypted ballot could not be parsed as JSON.
errors.ballotMissingSelection: A decrypted ballot does not contain a candidate selection.
errors.ballotEmptySelection: A decrypted ballot contains an empty candidate selection.
errors.ballotUnknownCandidate: Ballot {{ballotId}} resolves to an unknown candidate identifier.
